testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.sse.PlaylistUpdatedSseListenerTest

testcase.name: onPlaylistUpdated does not deliver to devices without an active assignment()
onPlaylistUpdated swallows repository failures so the post-commit phase never re-throws()
onPlaylistUpdated broadcasts PLAYLIST_UPDATE to every actively assigned device with a live emitter()
onPlaylistUpdated keeps fanning out when one device's emitter is broken()
onPlaylistUpdated is a benign no-op when no devices are actively assigned()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-02T23:50:33.443+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-mapped totalEmittersForDevice=1
